name: outlook-mcp
description: Connects your LLM to Outlook with multi-account support. Read and write emails, contacts, and calendar events.

azure_client_id.title: Azure Client ID
azure_client_id.description: Required. Application (client) ID of your multi-tenant Azure AD app. OAuth cannot start without it — see the README Azure Setup guide.

azure_tenant_id.title: Azure Tenant ID (Advanced)
azure_tenant_id.description: Optional. Pin sign-in to a single tenant. Leave empty for multi-tenant.

download_directory.title: Download Directory
download_directory.description: Directory path where email attachments and files will be downloaded. Leave empty to use system temp directory.
